about.en: Dash is a payments-focused cryptocurrency derived from Bitcoin and designed for fast, low-cost transfers. The network uses proof of work, masternodes, and features such as InstantSend and PrivateSend to support everyday payments and optional privacy. DASH is the native asset used for transactions, fees, miner rewards, and masternode incentives.
about.es: Dash es una criptomoneda centrada en pagos, derivada de Bitcoin y disenada para transferencias rapidas y de bajo coste. La red usa proof of work, masternodes y funciones como InstantSend y PrivateSend para soportar pagos cotidianos y privacidad opcional. DASH es el activo nativo usado para transacciones, comisiones, recompensas de mineria e incentivos de masternodes.
about.ca: Dash es una criptomoneda centrada en pagaments, derivada de Bitcoin i dissenyada per a transferencies rapides i de baix cost. La xarxa usa proof of work, masternodes i funcions com InstantSend i PrivateSend per suportar pagaments quotidians i privacitat opcional. DASH es l'actiu natiu usat per a transaccions, comissions, recompenses de mineria i incentius de masternodes.
